objective: Assess understanding of perimeter concepts: modeling, finding, unknown sides, area vs perimeter, same perimeter/different areas, same area/different perimeters

questions.question: What is the perimeter of a shape?
A rectangle on a grid is 6 units long and 3 units wide. Count all sides. Perimeter = __ units.
A rectangle is 9 cm long and 4 cm wide. What is the perimeter?
A square has a side length of 7 m. Perimeter = __ m.
A triangle has sides 5 ft, 8 ft, and 11 ft. What is the perimeter?
A triangle has a perimeter of 25 cm. Two sides are 9 cm and 8 cm. Third side = __ cm.
A rectangle has a perimeter of 30 m and a length of 9 m. What is the width?
A square has a perimeter of 56 cm. Side length = __ cm.
Which unit measures area?
A rectangle is 8 cm long and 5 cm wide. Area = __ sq cm. Perimeter = __ cm.
Rectangle A is 7×2. Rectangle B is 5×4. Which statement is true?
Three rectangles all have perimeter 20 cm: A(9×1), B(7×3), C(5×5). Which has the greatest area?
Two rectangles have perimeter 24 cm: A(10×2) and B(6×6). B's area is __ sq cm more than A's.
Three rectangles all have area 24 sq cm: A(24×1), B(8×3), C(6×4). Which has the smallest perimeter?
Two rectangles have area 36 sq cm: A(18×2) and B(6×6). A's perimeter is __ cm more than B's.
A rectangular playground is 15 m long and 8 m wide. How much fencing is needed to go around it?
A rectangular garden has a perimeter of 38 ft and a width of 7 ft. What is the length?
Tina has 28 m of fence to make a rectangular pen. She wants the greatest possible area. What dimensions should she use and what is the area?
questions.answer: 7×7 = 49 sq m. A square gives the greatest area for a given perimeter.

questions.question: A farmer needs a field with area 40 sq m. Options: 40×1, 10×4, 8×5. Which uses the least fencing? How much fencing is needed?
A rectangle has a perimeter of 22 cm and an area of 24 sq cm. What are the dimensions? Show your work.
questions.answer: l+w=11. Factor pairs of 24 that add to 11: 8+3=11, 8×3=24 ✓. Length=8 cm, Width=3 cm.
